---
title: Cognitive Health in the U.S.
image: AD_image.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/minyoungso/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/biosoaji
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:sominy@umich.edu
---

::: {style="font-size: 150%;"}
**An Ecological Study**\
**of**\
**Prevalence of Alzheimer’s Dementia and Its Potential Risk Factors**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 125%;"}
BIOS 620 Final Project
:::
\
\
\

::: {style="font-size: 150%;"}
**Minyoung So**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 135%;"}
**Department of Biostatistics**

**Universtity of Michigan**
:::
